base_query: (all:LLM OR all:LLMs OR all:"large language model" OR all:"large language models") AND all:FPGA

supplemental_queries.base_query: (all:LLM OR all:LLMs OR all:"large language model" OR all:"large language models") AND all:FPGA AND (all:RTL OR all:Verilog OR all:SystemVerilog OR all:VHDL OR all:Chisel OR all:HLS)
(all:LLM OR all:LLMs OR all:"large language model" OR all:"large language models") AND all:FPGA AND (all:PyTorch OR all:MLIR OR all:torch-mlir OR all:compiler OR all:compilation OR all:dataflow)

(all:LLM OR all:LLMs OR all:"large language model" OR all:"large language models") AND all:FPGA AND (all:attention OR all:Softmax OR all:exponential OR all:exponentiation OR all:GELU OR all:normalization)
(all:transformer OR all:"language model" OR all:LLM) AND all:FPGA
